untranslatable_reason: Signal requires manual identification of: (1) upward channel breakout point, (2) swing low point a, (3) reaction high point b, (4) prior high h, and (5) construction of parallel trendlines with precise geometric intersection. These require dynamic trendline detection and geometric line intersection calculations not available in the allowed indicator set. The price objective is defined by the intersection of price with a dynamically constructed support line, which cannot be expressed with static indicators.
translation_notes: This is a classical technical analysis pattern (Kaufman channel reversal) that fundamentally requires trendline drawing and geometric intersection calculations. The entry signal (breakout of upward channel) and exit signal (price reaching support line intersection) both depend on real-time trendline construction. A simplified proxy entry was suggested (close below prior high) and exit (close below sma_20 as trend confirmation), but these do not capture the true signal logic. Implementation would require a custom indicator for trendline detection and intersection calculation.
